metadata.description: Short project identifier used in resource names.
Globally-unique suffix (e.g. 8-char hex) to avoid naming collisions.
PostgreSQL admin password.  Must be strong.
Docker image tag to deploy (e.g. dev-latest or git SHA).
Globally unique suffix added to shared resource names.
Resource ID of the App Service that emits application telemetry.

properties.description: Alert when the app records more than 10 exceptions in 5 minutes.
Alert when auth.login_failed custom events exceed 20 in 5 minutes.

allOf.query: AppEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(5m) | where Name == "auth.login_failed"

properties.description: Alert when the app records an unhandled exception or trace in the last 5 minutes.

allOf.query: union isfuzzy=true (AppExceptions | where TimeGenerated >= ago(5m) | where tolower(tostring(column_ifexists("HandledAt", ""))) == "unhandled"), (AppTraces | where TimeGenerated >= ago(5m) | where Message has "Unhandled exception" or Message has "uncaught exception")

metadata.description: Globally unique PostgreSQL flexible server name
Globally unique Key Vault name (3–24 alphanumeric + hyphens)
Name of the App Service Plan
SKU name (B1 is cheapest for Linux containers)
Log Analytics workspace resource ID for diagnostics
Application Insights connection string injected into the web app runtime.
Globally unique Front Door profile name
Backend host name (App Service default hostname)
Log Analytics workspace resource ID for diagnostics
Principal ID of the managed identity to grant access
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Principal ID of the managed identity to grant access
